title: Pong
description: The classic. First to 5 wins. You vs. the machine.

title: Head Chef
description: Cook tasty dishes for a hungry panda. No timers, no stress.

title: Pixel Paint
description: Colour by number! 500+ pictures in 14 categories, draw your own, save designs, or pixelify a selfie.

title: Bristol Fashion
description: Design fabulous looks — hair, makeup, outfits — and fill your wardrobe.

title: Mystery Binoculars
description: AR safari! Search your room for hiding animals and tap them before they bolt.

title: Worms
description: Slither, eat, grow. Become the biggest worm in the mud.

title: DJ Panel
description: Drop beats and jam over rock, jazz and pop grooves. Airhorn included.

title: My World
description: Explore a cute 3D world — wander the park and mall, pop into shops, make friends.

title: Super Pac Man
description: Pac-Man with a twist: powerups, fire hazards, and role reversal — become the ghost!

title: Mini Life
description: You're 1cm tall! Jump and fly around a giant, super-detailed kitchen.

title: Football Pens
description: Win the World Cup one penalty shootout at a time. Pick your nation and aim!

title: Growing Gardens
description: Design a 3D garden block by block — plant, water and watch it grow over the days.

title: Speed Tables
description: Times tables sprint! Score as many 12×12 answers as you can in 60 seconds.

title: Germ Racers
description: Top-down racing through the gut! Pick a germ, dodge the immune system, and burst out the far end first.

title: I Ate an Author
description: A creative studio — write stories, draw comics, design your own fonts, paint, and save it all to your gallery.
